lesson.title: 1.2.1 ORAL LITERATURE
activities: The Ministry understands the challenges that come with transitioning to a new curriculum
that is Competence-Based. The choice of the Competence-Based Curriculum (CBC) marks a
transformative step in improving education quality and relevance. This module reflects the
Ministry’s unwavering commitment to making this journey as smooth as possible for
that align with the CBC’s objectives. However, teachers are encouraged to supplement this
module with their own research and innovations in order to address any gaps that may arise
